rows.yaml:
collection: Default
playbooks:
  - name: Hello Connector
    description: Manual trigger playbook that sends an email via SMTP
    steps:
      - type: start
        name: Run
        next: Send Email
      - type: connector
        name: Send Email
        arguments:
          connector: smtp
          operation: send_email
          config: ''
          params:
            to_recipients: test@example.com
            subject: Hello from FortiSOAR
            body: This is a test email sent via the SMTP connector.
        next: End
      - type: end
        name: End

rows.yaml:
collection: Sample Collection
playbooks:
  - name: Severity Router
    description: Route alerts based on severity level
    steps:
      - type: start
        name: Run
        next: Check Severity
      - type: decision
        name: Check Severity
        conditions:
          - display: High Severity
            when: "{{ vars.input.params.severity == 'High' }}"
            next: High Severity End
          - display: Not High
            default: true
            next: Other Severity End
      - type: end
        name: High Severity End
      - type: end
        name: Other Severity End

rows.yaml:
collection: Default
playbooks:
  - name: Fetch and Reference Alerts
    description: Demonstrates manual trigger with find_record and downstream variable reference
    is_active: true
    steps:
      - type: start
        name: Run
        next: Query Alerts

      - type: find_record
        name: Query Alerts
        arguments:
          module: alerts
          query:
            logic: AND
            filters:
              - field: status
                operator: eq
                value: "Open"
          partial: true
        next: Process Results

      - type: set_variable
        name: Process Results
        vars:
          alert_count: "{{ vars.steps.Query_Alerts.result['hydra:totalCount'] | default(0) }}"
          first_alert_name: "{{ vars.steps.Query_Alerts.result['hydra:member'][0].name | default('No alerts found') }}"
          all_alerts: "{{ vars.steps.Query_Alerts.result['hydra:member'] | default([]) }}"
        message:
          content: "Fetched {{ vars.alert_count }} alert(s). First alert: {{ vars.first_alert_name }}"
          tags:
            - alert_fetch

      - type: end
        name: Done

rows.yaml:
collection: Default
playbooks:
  - name: Triage Alert
    description: Right-click action to triage alerts based on severity and stamp a verdict
    is_active: true
    steps:
      - type: start
        name: Triage Alert
        arguments:
          module: alerts
          button_label: Triage Alert
      - type: decision
        name: Check Severity
        conditions:
          - display: High Severity
            when: "{{ vars.input.records[0].severity == 'High' }}"
            next: Mark as High Priority
          - display: Else
            default: true
            next: Mark as Lower Priority
      - type: update_record
        name: Mark as High Priority
        arguments:
          module: alerts
          collection: "{{ vars.input.records[0]['@id'] }}"
          resource:
            verdict: High Priority - Requires Immediate Action
        next: End
      - type: update_record
        name: Mark as Lower Priority
        arguments:
          module: alerts
          collection: "{{ vars.input.records[0]['@id'] }}"
          resource:
            verdict: Lower Priority - Standard Review
        next: End
      - type: end
        name: End

rows.yaml:
collection: FortiSOAR
playbooks:
  - name: Stamp Alert On Create
    description: Fires when an alert is created and stamps a comment with the alert details.
    steps:
      - type: start_on_create
        arguments:
          module: alerts
      - type: set_variable
        name: Prepare Comment
        vars:
          alert_name: '{{ vars.input.records[0].name }}'
          alert_id: '{{ vars.input.records[0].id }}'
          alert_severity: '{{ vars.input.records[0].severity }}'
          timestamp: '{{ now() }}'
      - type: update_record
        name: Stamp Comment
        arguments:
          module: alerts
          collection: '{{ vars.input.records[0]["@id"] }}'
          resource:
            comments: 'Alert auto-processed at {{ vars.timestamp }}. Alert: {{ vars.alert_name }} (ID: {{ vars.alert_id }}, Severity: {{ vars.alert_severity }})'
      - type: end
        name: Done

collection: Default
playbooks:
  - name: Alert Status Change Handler
    description: Fires when an alert's status changes and updates the resolution field if status is Closed
    is_active: true
    steps:
      - type: start_on_update
        name: Alert Status Changed
        arguments:
          module: alerts
          when:
            logic: AND
            filters:
              - field: status
                op: changed
        next: Check If Closed
      - type: decision
        name: Check If Closed
        conditions:
          - display: Status is Closed
            when: "{{ vars.input.records[0].status == 'Closed' }}"
            next: Update Resolution
          - display: Status is not Closed
            default: true
            next: End
      - type: update_record
        name: Update Resolution
        arguments:
          module: alerts
          collection: "{{ vars.input.records[0]['@id'] }}"
          resource:
            resolution: Resolved
        next: End
      - type: end
        name: End

rows.yaml:
collection: Default
playbooks:
  - name: Create Alerts from Static List
    description: Builds a static list of alert payloads and creates multiple alert records
    is_active: true
    steps:
      - type: start
        name: Run
        next: Build Alert List
      - type: set_variable
        name: Build Alert List
        vars:
          alert_list:
            - name: "Phishing Detection - Campaign A"
              description: "Suspicious email with malicious attachment detected"
              severity: "High"
              source: "Email Security Gateway"
            - name: "Malware Alert - Endpoint 234"
              description: "Known malware signature detected on endpoint"
              severity: "Critical"
              source: "Endpoint Detection and Response"
            - name: "Network Anomaly - Unusual Traffic"
              description: "Unusual outbound traffic pattern to known C2 domain"
              severity: "Medium"
              source: "Network Monitoring"
        next: Create First Alert
      - type: create_record
        name: Create First Alert
        arguments:
          module: alerts
          resource:
            name: "{{ vars.alert_list[0].name }}"
            description: "{{ vars.alert_list[0].description }}"
            severity: "{{ vars.alert_list[0].severity | picklist('severity') }}"
            source: "{{ vars.alert_list[0].source }}"
        next: Create Second Alert
      - type: create_record
        name: Create Second Alert
        arguments:
          module: alerts
          resource:
            name: "{{ vars.alert_list[1].name }}"
            description: "{{ vars.alert_list[1].description }}"
            severity: "{{ vars.alert_list[1].severity | picklist('severity') }}"
            source: "{{ vars.alert_list[1].source }}"
        next: Create Third Alert
      - type: create_record
        name: Create Third Alert
        arguments:
          module: alerts
          resource:
            name: "{{ vars.alert_list[2].name }}"
            description: "{{ vars.alert_list[2].description }}"
            severity: "{{ vars.alert_list[2].severity | picklist('severity') }}"
            source: "{{ vars.alert_list[2].source }}"
        next: End
      - type: end
        name: End

rows.yaml:
collection: Demo
playbooks:
  - name: Manual Verdict Gate
    description: Manual trigger with approve/reject decision that routes to verdict stamps
    steps:
      - type: start
        name: Run
        next: Request Verdict

      - type: manual_input
        name: Request Verdict
        arguments:
          title: "Review and Approve"
          description: "Please review the details and select your verdict."
        options:
          - display: Approve
            primary: true
            next: Set Approved
          - display: Reject
            next: Set Rejected

      - type: set_variable
        name: Set Approved
        vars:
          verdict: approved
          timestamp: "{{ now() }}"
        message:
          content: "Verdict: **Approved** at {{ vars.timestamp }}"
          tags:
            - automation
            - approved
        next: End

      - type: set_variable
        name: Set Rejected
        vars:
          verdict: rejected
          timestamp: "{{ now() }}"
        message:
          content: "Verdict: **Rejected** at {{ vars.timestamp }}"
          tags:
            - automation
            - rejected
        next: End

      - type: end
        name: End

rows.yaml:
collection: Default
playbooks:
  - name: Find and Update Alert Severity
    description: Finds an alert by name and updates its severity field
    parameters:
      - alert_name
      - new_severity
    steps:
      - type: start
        name: Run
        arguments:
          button_label: Find and Update Alert
      - type: find_record
        name: Find Alert By Name
        arguments:
          module: alerts
          query:
            logic: AND
            filters:
              - field: name
                operator: eq
                value: '{{ vars.input.params.alert_name }}'
          partial: true
        next: Check If Found
      - type: decision
        name: Check If Found
        conditions:
          - display: Found
            when: "{{ vars.steps.Find_Alert_By_Name.get('hydra:member') | length > 0 }}"
            next: Update Severity
        conditions:
          - display: Not Found
            default: true
            next: End
      - type: update_record
        name: Update Severity
        arguments:
          module: alerts
          collection: "{{ vars.steps.Find_Alert_By_Name['hydra:member'][0]['@id'] }}"
          resource:
            severity: "{{ vars.input.params.new_severity | picklist('severity') }}"
        next: End
      - type: end
        name: End

rows.yaml:
collection: Demo
playbooks:
  - name: IP Reputation Check
    description: Query VirusTotal IP reputation and branch on malicious analysis count
    parameters:
      - ip
    steps:
      - type: start
        name: Run
        arguments:
          button_label: Check IP Reputation
        next: Query VirusTotal
      - type: connector
        name: Query VirusTotal
        arguments:
          connector: virustotal
          operation: query_ip
          config: ''
          params:
            ip: '{{ vars.input.params.ip }}'
        next: Check Malicious Count
      - type: decision
        name: Check Malicious Count
        conditions:
          - display: Malicious
            when: '{{ vars.steps.Query_VirusTotal.is_malicious }}'
            next: Set Malicious Verdict
          - display: Else
            default: true
            next: Set Clean Verdict
      - type: set_variable
        name: Set Malicious Verdict
        vars:
          verdict: malicious
          malicious_count: '{{ vars.steps.Query_VirusTotal.detections | default(0) }}'
        next: End
      - type: set_variable
        name: Set Clean Verdict
        vars:
          verdict: clean
          reputation: '{{ vars.steps.Query_VirusTotal.reputation | default(0) }}'
        next: End
      - type: end
        name: End

rows.yaml:
collection: Confirm Before Block
playbooks:
  - name: Confirm Before Block
    description: Manual trigger to pause and ask SOC analyst for approval before performing a block action
    is_active: true
    steps:
      - type: start
        name: Run
        next: Ask Analyst for Approval

      - type: manual_input
        name: Ask Analyst for Approval
        arguments:
          title: Confirm Block Action
          description: Review the block request and approve or reject before proceeding.
        options:
          - display: Approve
            primary: true
            next: Record Approval
          - display: Reject
            next: Record Rejection

      - type: set_variable
        name: Record Approval
        vars:
          action_status: approved
          timestamp: '{{ now() }}'
          analyst_decision: The block was approved by the analyst
        message:
          content: Block action approved at {{ now() }}
          tags:
            - block_approved
            - automation

      - type: set_variable
        name: Record Rejection
        vars:
          action_status: rejected
          timestamp: '{{ now() }}'
          analyst_decision: The block was rejected by the analyst
        message:
          content: Block action rejected at {{ now() }}
          tags:
            - block_rejected
            - automation

      - type: end
        name: End After Approval

      - type: end
        name: End After Rejection

rows.yaml:
collection: FortiSOAR
playbooks:
  - name: IP Block or Allow Decision
    description: Analyst manually selects an IP address and decides to block or allow it
    steps:
      - type: start
        name: Run
        next: IP Action Request
      - type: manual_input
        name: IP Action Request
        arguments:
          title: IP Address Action
          description: Enter an IP address and select whether to block or allow it
          inputs:
            - name: ip_address
              kind: ipv4
              label: IP Address
              required: true
            - name: action
              kind: select
              label: Action
              required: true
              options:
                - block
                - allow
        options:
          - display: Block IP
            next: Block IP on FortiGate
          - display: Allow IP
            next: Allow Flow
      - type: connector
        name: Block IP on FortiGate
        arguments:
          connector: fortigate-firewall
          operation: block_ip_new
          config: ''
          params:
            method: Quarantine Based
            ip_addresses: "{{ vars.steps.IP_Action_Request.input.ip_address }}"
            time_to_live: 1 Hour
        next: Log Block Action
      - type: set_variable
        name: Log Block Action
        vars:
          action_taken: blocked
          ip_blocked: "{{ vars.steps.IP_Action_Request.input.ip_address }}"
        message:
          content: "IP {{ vars.steps.IP_Action_Request.input.ip_address }} has been blocked on FortiGate"
          tags:
            - automated_block
        next: End
      - type: set_variable
        name: Allow Flow
        vars:
          action_taken: allowed
          ip_allowed: "{{ vars.steps.IP_Action_Request.input.ip_address }}"
        message:
          content: "IP {{ vars.steps.IP_Action_Request.input.ip_address }} was allowed - no action taken"
          tags:
            - automated_allow
        next: End
      - type: end
        name: End

rows.yaml:
collection: Default
playbooks:
  - name: Disk Full Auto Cleanup
    description: Triggered when an alert with category 'disk_full' is created. Finds the affected host in assets, runs clean_tmp Ansible job via SSH, then decides whether to page on-call or resolve based on free-space percentage.
    is_active: true
    steps:
      - type: start_on_create
        arguments:
          module: alerts
          when:
            logic: AND
            filters:
              - field: category
                op: eq
                value: disk_full
        next: Find Host in Assets

      - type: find_record
        name: Find Host in Assets
        arguments:
          module: assets
          query:
            logic: AND
            filters:
              - field: ipv4_address
                operator: eq
                value: '{{ vars.input.records[0].affected_host }}'
          partial: true
        next: Execute Cleanup Job

      - type: connector
        name: Execute Cleanup Job
        arguments:
          connector: ssh
          operation: run_remote_command
          config: ''
          params:
            cmd: 'ansible-playbook -i {{ vars.steps.Find_Host_in_Assets["hydra:member"][0].ipv4_address }} clean_tmp.yml'
        next: Check Free Space

      - type: decision
        name: Check Free Space
        conditions:
          - display: Free Space Below 10%
            when: '{{ vars.steps.Execute_Cleanup_Job.free_space_percent | int < 10 }}'
            next: Page On Call
          - display: Else
            default: true
            next: Resolve Alert

      - type: connector
        name: Page On Call
        arguments:
          connector: pagerduty
          operation: create_incident
          config: ''
          params:
            from: '{{ vars.input.params.requester_email }}'
            title: 'Disk Full Alert - Cleanup Failed for {{ vars.steps.Find_Host_in_Assets["hydra:member"][0].hostname }}'
            description: 'Automated disk cleanup did not free sufficient space on {{ vars.steps.Find_Host_in_Assets["hydra:member"][0].hostname }}. Current free space: {{ vars.steps.Execute_Cleanup_Job.free_space_percent }}%'
            priority: Priority 1
        next: End

      - type: set_variable
        name: Resolve Alert
        vars:
          alert_status: '{{ "Closed" | picklist("status") }}'
        message:
          content: 'Disk cleanup completed successfully. Automatic remediation applied.'
          tags:
            - auto_cleanup
            - disk_management
        next: Update Alert

      - type: update_record
        name: Update Alert
        arguments:
          module: alerts
          collection: '{{ vars.input.records[0]["@id"] }}'
          resource:
            status: '{{ vars.alert_status }}'
        next: End

      - type: end
        name: End

rows.yaml:
collection: Default
playbooks:
  - name: Akamai Block URL via Network Lists API
    description: Block a URL via Akamai Network Lists API using HTTP POST. Analyst provides URL; playbook posts to Akamai and comments the response status.
    is_active: true
    parameters:
      - akamai_bearer_token
      - akamai_list_id
    steps:
      - type: start
        name: Run
        arguments:
          module: alerts
          button_label: Block URL via Akamai
          run_mode: per_record

      - type: manual_input
        name: Enter URL to Block
        arguments:
          title: Akamai Network Lists - Block URL
          description: Provide the URL to add to Akamai's blocked network list
          inputs:
            - name: target_url
              kind: url
              label: URL to Block
              required: true
        options:
          - display: Proceed
            primary: true
            next: Block URL via API
          - display: Cancel
            next: End

      - type: connector
        name: Block URL via API
        arguments:
          connector: http
          operation: http_post
          config: ''
          params:
            rest_api: 'https://api.akamai.com/network-lists/v2/lists/{{ vars.input.params.akamai_list_id }}/append'
            header: |
              {
                "Authorization": "Bearer {{ vars.input.params.akamai_bearer_token }}",
                "Content-Type": "application/json"
              }
            data: |
              {
                "list": ["{{ vars.steps.Enter_URL_to_Block.target_url }}"]
              }
        next: Comment Result

      - type: set_variable
        name: Comment Result
        vars:
          api_status: '{{ vars.steps.Block_URL_via_API.status_code | default("Unknown") }}'
          response_summary: '{{ vars.steps.Block_URL_via_API | to_json }}'
        message:
          content: |
            **Akamai Block URL Result**
            - URL: {{ vars.steps.Enter_URL_to_Block.target_url }}
            - API Status Code: {{ vars.api_status }}
            - Response: {{ vars.response_summary }}
          tags:
            - akamai_block
            - automation

      - type: end
        name: End
